name.description: Human-readable name for the API key

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to this API key

expiry_date.description: Optional expiration date for the API key (must be in the future)

oneOf.description: Single IP address or CIDR range
Array of IP addresses or CIDR ranges

allowed_ips.description: IP restrictions for the API key. If not provided, the key can be used from any IP
